reason: Browser-use feature successfully executes browser commands through agent chat interface
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Application loaded successfully showing SuperAgent interface with agent list in sidebar
Step 2: Found and clicked the "QA-20260504-182506-3gfd" agent in the sidebar - Agent opened successfully with chat interface displayed
Step 3: Sent message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." - Message typed and sent using Cmd+Enter, agent began processing
Step 4: Waited up to 3 minutes for response - Response received within 7 seconds
Step 5: Verified response mentions "Example Domain" - Response clearly shows "The page title is Example Domain" with browser preview panel displaying the actual Example Domain page
